---
title: "2022-09-19-update"
format: 
  html: 
    code-fold: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
```



```{r}
# noisy result
noisy_cts = fread("../code/results/noise/out_perind.counts.noise.gz")
colnames(noisy_cts) = colnames(noisy_cts) %>% 
  str_extract("chrom|(SM\\-[A-Z0-9]{5})")
```


Functional introns: 

```{r}
noisy_cts[!str_detect(chrom, "\\*"), chrom] %>% unique %>% length
```

Noisy introns:
```{r}
noisy_cts[str_detect(chrom, "\\*"), chrom] %>% unique %>% length
```


```{r}
x = frea
```
